mapper.sql: select ae.id, ae.agent_id, ae.agent_name, ae.category_id, ae.status, ae.start_time, ae.start_user, ae.start_phone, ae.start_name, ae.examine_user, ae.examine_user_id, ae.examine_time, ae.`desc`, ae.follow, ae.agent_avatar, ae.prologue
mapper.insert:
insert into zhs_agent_examine
id, agent_id, agent_name, category_id, `status`, start_time, start_user, start_phone, start_name, examine_user, examine_user_id, examine_time, `desc`, follow, agent_avatar, prologue,
#{id}, #{agentId}, #{agentName}, #{categoryId}, #{status}, #{startTime}, #{startUser}, #{startPhone}, #{startName}, #{examineUser}, #{examineUserId}, #{examineTime}, #{desc}, #{follow}, #{agentAvatar}, #{prologue},

INSERT INTO agents ( agent_id, agent_name, agent_description, agent_avatar, agent_version, creator_id, creator_name, coze_account_id, publish_status, created_at, updated_at, source, prologue ) VALUES ( #{agent_id}, #{agent_name}, #{description}, #{icon}, #{version}, #{custom_param.uuid}, #{creator_name}, #{creator_id}, 'draft', NOW(), NOW(), 'tbox', #{custom_param.welcom} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE agent_name = VALUES(agent_name), agent_description = VALUES(agent_description), agent_avatar = VALUES(agent_avatar), agent_version = VALUES(agent_version), coze_account_id = VALUES(coze_account_id), publish_status = 'draft', updated_at = NOW();

INSERT INTO zhs_agent_examine ( agent_id, agent_name, agent_avatar, status, start_time, start_user, start_name ) VALUES ( #{agent_id}, #{agent_name}, #{icon}, 0, NOW(), #{custom_param.uuid}, #{creator_name} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE -- 更新可修改的业务字段 agent_name = VALUES(agent_name), agent_avatar = VALUES(agent_avatar), status = VALUES(status), -- 审核状态可更新（比如从0-待审核改为1-审核中） -- 保留首次发起审核的核心信息，不覆盖 start_time = zhs_agent_examine.start_time, start_user = zhs_agent_examine.start_user, start_name = zhs_agent_examine.start_name;
mapper.delete:
delete from zhs_agent_examine where id in
#{id}
mapper.update: update zhs_agent_examine set status = 5 where agent_id = #{agent_id}
update agents set publish_status = 'unpublished' where agent_id = #{agent_id}
